title: sagenia hippocrepis
intro: Sagenia hippocrepis, also known as the Horse's Teeth Fern, is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in soothing skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Sagenia hippocrepis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Sagenia hippocrepis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
